hero.title: ONE INGREDIENT CHEFS NEVER SKIP: OLIVE OIL
hero.badge: This year's olive oil is sold out.
hero.lead: The next order will be possible in October. Join the waiting list and we'll let you know first when it will be available.
hero.finePrint: We'll only write when the new olive oil is ready. No commitment. No newsletters. No spam.

design.title: Made for Modern Kitchens.
design.lead: A lot of olive oil brands still look like they belong in your grandparents' pantry. We made something you'd actually want to leave out on the counter.

packaging.title: No Broken Glass. No Oily Mess.
packaging.lead: Glass bottles break. Counters get oily. We designed our tin to be easier to handle, harder to damage, and much easier to pour exactly where you want it.

health.title: Does extra virgin matter?
health.lead1: We press olives cold. That's what "extra virgin" means. Because if you heat olives, you cook the personality out of them. And we like personality.
health.lead2: Cold pressing keeps all the good things olives develop under the Mediterranean sun. The natural antioxidants. The flavor. The character.

taste.title: Gently bitter, slightly spicy
taste.lead1: Amarea is single origin. Early harvest. Cold-pressed. Milled shortly after picking.
taste.lead2: On the palate? Gently bitter. Slightly spicy. Balanced. You'll notice a delicate olive aroma with hints of fresh grass and tomato leaves. And that little peppery kick at the end? That's not a flaw. That's character.

harvest.small: milled shortly after picking, single origin

items.title: Brunch with the people you like
A finishing drizzle, no occasion needed

origin.title: Good olives. Good weather. Good oil.
origin.lead1: We are passionate foodies living in Lucerne, but with roots in southern Italy. Where the sun is strong. Where people speak louder. Where flavor is not negotiable.
origin.lead2: Down there, people take their time with the things that matter. Cooking. Eating. Talking. Staying at the table longer than planned.

close.title: RESERVE YOUR TIN
close.lead: We're bottling the first batch this autumn. Reserve your tin before your favourite shelf spot is taken.
close.finePrint: We'll only write when the new olive oil is ready. No commitment. No newsletters. No spam.

footer.copy: Olio Extra Vergine di Oliva · Zürich · © 2026

items.desc: Natural antioxidants from early-harvest olives — preserved because we never apply heat.
The "good" fats associated with heart health and a balanced Mediterranean diet.
Naturally occurring oleocanthal — the source of that peppery kick at the back of the throat.
